message:
fix(node): prevent resource leaks and TOCTOU races in 4 modules

Addresses resource safety issues including orphaned temp files, thread
leaks, and time-of-check/time-of-use race conditions.

- connector/rollout_state.rs: Add persist_lock() with OnceLock/Mutex to
  serialize concurrent writes, preventing TOCTOU race on version check
  during concurrent state persistence
- control_plane/root_pointer.rs: Introduce TempFileGuard RAII struct with
  Drop impl for automatic cleanup of temp files on error or successful
  rename, preventing orphaned temp files on failure paths
- ops/engine_dispatcher.rs: Remove exists() check before remove_file(),
  eliminating TOCTOU window where file could be created between check
  and removal; just attempt removal directly
- runtime/lockstep_harness.rs: Join reader threads after child process
  kill to prevent leaking spawned I/O threads on timeout paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
